title: Men Who Have Sex with Men (MSM) Error processing SSI file
text:
orted regarding Shigella species, for which rapid intercontinental dissemination of a S. flexneri 3a lineage with high-level resistance to azithromycin through sexual transmission among MSM ( 272 ) and clusters of multidrug resistant shigella cases among MSM have recently been reported ( 273 ). Multidrug-resistant Campylobacter species have also been documented ( 266 , 274 ). For MSM patients with diarrhea, clinicians should request laboratory examinations, including stool culture; provide counseling about the risk for infection with enteric pathogens during sexual activity (oral-anal, oral-genital, anal-genital, and digital-anal contact) that could expose them to enteric pathogens; and choose treatment, when needed, according to antimicrobial drug susceptibility.
